case_title: WING, CHEUNG KWUNN et al VS MORRIS, CATHERINE W.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,500.00 FILED BY WING, CHEUNG KWUNN OUYANG, MAOQING AS TO DEFENDANT MORRIS, CATHERINE W. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-03-1995 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT C
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MORRIS, CATHERINE W.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WING, CHEUNG KWUNN OUYANG, MAOQING RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MORRIS, CATHERINE W. $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,515.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT MORRIS, CATHERINE W.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WING, CHEUNG KWUNN OUYANG, MAOQING IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MORRIS, CATHERINE W. EACH PARTY TO BEAR THEIR OWN COSTS. JUDGM. ENTERED IN SCA 23978 ON 9-28-95. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 23978, RECORD TRANSFERRED
